titleStmt.title: SII 17.686: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 686. (A.R. No. 630 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.

This records the gift of 32 cows, entrusted to the care of Tillaināyakakkōṉ-vaḍugaṉ, a shepherd, by Valantaruvān Kōsalattaraiyaṉ of Paḻaiyāṟai in Āmba (Ambar ?)-nāḍu, for burning a perpetual lamp with one uḻakku of ghee daily, by the measure called tirukkārikaraiyuḍaiyāṉ, in the temple of Tirukkārikarai-ppiḷḷaiyār, in Niṉṟaya-nāḍu, in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśoḻā-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalat
tu naṭuvilmalai ninṟaiya nāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkārikaraip piḷḷaiyāṟku kulottuṅka coḻamaṇṭalattu tiruna
ṟaiyūrnāṭṭuk kiḻpaḻaiyāṟṟukkut talaimāṟuviṭṭa Āmpanāṭṭup paḻaiyāṟai kaḻa koṭṭamuṭaiyān kocalattarai
can valantaruvān kocalattaraiyanen tirununtāviḷakkonṟukkuc cāvāmuvāpperā pacu muppattiraṇṭum Immaṇṭalat
tu Innāṭṭu Iṭaiyan tillai nāyakakkon vaṭukanen Ippacu muppattiraṇṭuṅ kaikkoṇṭu tirukkārikaraiyuṭaiyānāl nāḷon
ṟu neyyuḻakkāka Aḷakka kaṭavenāka Upaiyaṅ koṇṭen śrīmāheśvara Irakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.686 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
